from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from v44_v50_common import (
    LOCAL_OUT,
    REPORTS,
    REQUIRED_REGIONS,
    base_stage_statuses,
    file_row,
    read_json,
    region_metric_pass,
    scan_forbidden,
    utc_now,
    v30_prior_prediction_ready,
    write_json,
    write_md,
)


OUT = LOCAL_OUT / "V44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate"
JSON = REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.json"
MD = REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.md"


def main() -> int:
    OUT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    v32 = read_json(REPORTS / "20260508_v32_candidate_inference_region_audit.json")
    v29 = read_json(REPORTS / "20260508_v29_normal_route_rescue.json")
    v30_ready, v30_blockers, _ = v30_prior_prediction_ready()
    metrics = v32.get("region_metrics") if isinstance(v32.get("region_metrics"), dict) else {}
    region_ok, region_blockers = region_metric_pass(metrics)
    contact_sheet = Path(str(v32.get("contact_sheet", "")))
    candidate_points = Path(str(v32.get("candidate_points_world", "")))
    candidate_normals = Path(str(v32.get("candidate_normals_geometric", "")))
    visual_items = {
        "full_body_open3d_source": file_row(contact_sheet),
        "candidate_points": file_row(candidate_points),
        "candidate_geometric_normals": file_row(candidate_normals),
    }
    blockers: list[str] = []
    blockers.extend(region_blockers)
    if not contact_sheet.is_file():
        blockers.append("V32 contact sheet missing")
    if not candidate_points.is_file():
        blockers.append("V32 candidate points missing")
    if not candidate_normals.is_file():
        blockers.append("V32 candidate normals missing")
    if v29.get("status") != "DONE_PASS":
        blockers.append("V29 normal route not pass")
    if not v30_ready:
        blockers.extend(v30_blockers)
    forbidden = scan_forbidden([OUT])
    if forbidden:
        blockers.append("forbidden current V44 output detected")
    # V44 is intentionally strict: without prior-enabled prediction pass, visual pre-promotion fails.
    status = "DONE_PASS" if not blockers else "DONE_FAIL_ROUTED"
    review = {
        "status": "PASS" if status == "DONE_PASS" else "FAIL",
        "regions": {region: bool(metrics.get(region, {}).get("pixel_count", metrics.get(region, {}).get("pixels", 0))) for region in REQUIRED_REGIONS},
        "requires_prior_enabled_prediction_pass": True,
        "v30_prior_prediction_ready": v30_ready,
        "blockers": blockers,
    }
    review_path = OUT / ("visual_review_codex_pass.json" if status == "DONE_PASS" else "visual_review_codex_fail.json")
    write_json(review_path, review)
    summary = {
        "task": "v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate",
        "created_utc": utc_now(),
        "status": status,
        "research_only": True,
        "visual_review_path": review_path,
        "region_support_pass": region_ok,
        "v30_prior_prediction_ready": v30_ready,
        "visual_items": visual_items,
        "stage_statuses": base_stage_statuses(),
        "forbidden_hit_count": len(forbidden),
        "blockers": blockers,
        "decision": "V44 pre-promotion visual gate cannot pass until prior-enabled predictions are available." if blockers else "V44 visual pre-promotion gate passed.",
    }
    write_json(JSON, summary)
    write_json(OUT / "summary.json", summary)
    write_md(MD, "V44 Strict Visual Pre-Promotion Gate", summary, [
        f"- visual_review_path: `{review_path}`",
        f"- v30_prior_prediction_ready: `{v30_ready}`",
    ])
    print({"status": status, "blockers": blockers})
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from v44_v50_common import LOCAL_OUT, REPORTS, file_row, read_json, scan_forbidden, utc_now, v30_prior_prediction_ready, write_json, write_md


OUT = LOCAL_OUT / "V49_package_dry_run"
JSON = REPORTS / "20260509_v49_package_dry_run.json"
MD = REPORTS / "20260509_v49_package_dry_run.md"


def stage_status(name: str) -> str:
    return str(read_json(REPORTS / f"20260509_{name}.json").get("status", "MISSING"))


def main() -> int:
    OUT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    v30_ready, v30_blockers, _ = v30_prior_prediction_ready()
    dryrun_candidate = OUT / "candidate_package_dryrun"
    dryrun_teacher = OUT / "teacher_package_dryrun"
    dryrun_candidate.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    dryrun_teacher.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    stages = {
        "v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate": read_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.json").get("status", "MISSING"),
        "v45_head_face_correction": read_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v45_head_face_correction.json").get("status", "MISSING"),
        "v46_hand_correction": read_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v46_hand_correction.json").get("status", "MISSING"),
        "v47_60view_correction": read_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v47_60view_correction.json").get("status", "MISSING"),
        "v48_temporal_correction": read_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v48_temporal_correction.json").get("status", "MISSING"),
    }
    required_files = {
        "candidate_points": Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V32_candidate_inference_research/candidate_points_world_research.npz"),
        "candidate_normals": Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V32_candidate_inference_research/candidate_normals_geometric_research.npz"),
        "head_face_patch": Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V33_head_face_detail_route/v33_head_face_refined_teacher.npz"),
        "hand_patch": Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V34_smplx_native_hand_route/v34_smplx_native_hand_continuity_patch.npz"),
        "temporal_teacher": Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V26_temporal_canonical_teacher/v26_temporal_canonical_teacher_targets.npz"),
        "visual_review": Path("output/surface_research_preflight_local/V44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate/visual_review_codex_pass.json"),
    }
    blockers: list[str] = []
    for stage, status in stages.items():
        if status != "DONE_PASS":
            blockers.append(f"{stage} not pass: {status}")
    for name, path in required_files.items():
        if not path.is_file():
            blockers.append(f"dry-run required file missing: {name}")
    if not v30_ready:
        blockers.extend(v30_blockers)
    forbidden = scan_forbidden([OUT])
    if forbidden:
        blockers.append("forbidden current V49 output detected")
    status = "DONE_PASS" if not blockers else "DONE_FAIL_ROUTED"
    dryrun_entry = {
        "dry_run_only": True,
        "would_write_formal_package": status == "DONE_PASS",
        "strict_registry_not_written": True,
        "candidate_files": {name: str(path) for name, path in required_files.items()},
        "v30_prior_prediction_ready": v30_ready,
        "stage_statuses": stages,
        "blockers": blockers,
    }
    write_json(OUT / "registry_entry_dryrun.json", dryrun_entry)
    write_json(dryrun_candidate / "manifest_dryrun.json", dryrun_entry)
    write_json(dryrun_teacher / "manifest_dryrun.json", dryrun_entry)
    summary = {
        "task": "v49_package_dry_run",
        "created_utc": utc_now(),
        "status": status,
        "research_only": True,
        "writes_formal_package": False,
        "writes_strict_registry": False,
        "candidate_package_dryrun": file_row(dryrun_candidate / "manifest_dryrun.json"),
        "teacher_package_dryrun": file_row(dryrun_teacher / "manifest_dryrun.json"),
        "registry_entry_dryrun": file_row(OUT / "registry_entry_dryrun.json"),
        "stage_statuses": stages,
        "forbidden_hit_count": len(forbidden),
        "blockers": blockers,
        "decision": "V49 dry-run passed; final promotion may evaluate strict conditions." if status == "DONE_PASS" else "V49 dry-run routed; formal promotion remains illegal.",
    }
    write_json(JSON, summary)
    write_json(OUT / "summary.json", summary)
    write_md(MD, "V49 Package Dry Run", summary, [
        f"- candidate_package_dryrun: `{dryrun_candidate}`",
        f"- teacher_package_dryrun: `{dryrun_teacher}`",
    ])
    print({"status": status, "blockers": blockers})
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T15:53:10.240Z","type":"compacted","payload":{"message":"","replacement_history":[{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"GPT:"你们现在的计划里 A5 是主攻，B-Fus3D / B-hand 是并行。这个还不够。我建议改成 四主线并行，但阶段性优先级不同：
A5: same-frame dense teacher backend          近期主攻B-Fus3D: VGGT latent -> learned SDF backend  中长期主攻B-GS: SMPL-X anchored + free Gaussians       人体表示主攻B-hand / B-hair: 局部专线                    hard gate blocker 主攻D-line: strict gate / cloud guard             常驻裁判
其中 A5 负责“有没有可能拿到 teacher”；B-Fus3D 负责“如果 teacher 不行，如何真正改模型表示”；B-GS 负责“人体衣物/头发/模板外结构怎么表达”；B-hand/B-hair 负责“导师最容易卡死的手和头发”。

3. A5 还要继续，但不能无限 COLMAP
A5 目前最重要的事实是：COLMAP CUDA 路线已经产出 fused.ply，但只有 2206 fused points。这个说明 external dense backend 不再是空话，但还远远不是 teacher。
A5 后续只允许做有限决策实验：
A5-0：先完成 v8 fused.ply strict audit
这是当前最高优先级。必须回答：
face_core 有多少点？head_face 是否成片？hairline 是否为空？hands 是否为空？depth-compatible residual 是否合理？Open3D 是 sparse points 还是像人体 surface？
如果 2206 点基本覆盖不到 face/hair/hands，v8 就只能作为 backend smoke，不能再讨论 teacher。
A5-1：三组 view strategy，不超过三组
只跑：
adjacent 12vhybrid 12v: 头脸正面 + 身体侧面 + 手部可见视角known_direct adjacent 12v
不要试 20 种 view set。判断标准不是 fused point count，而是：
head/face/hairline/hands 是否有连续覆盖Open3D 是否像正常人体是否能 rasterize 回 original 6-view protocol
A5-2：如果点云足够密，再做 surface extraction
如果 A5 仍是 sparse/noisy point cloud，禁止 Poisson。稀疏点 Poisson 只会生成假壳。
只有当点云达到：
fullbody 连续head/face/hairline 有面状覆盖hands 有连贯结构outlier ratio 可控
才允许进入：
cleaningcomponent filteringscreened Poisson / BPA / GS surface extractionstrict teacher gate
A5-3：COLMAP 失败后才进 OpenMVS / 2DGS / SuGaR-like
不是马上追名字。触发条件是：
adjacent 12v / hybrid 12v / known_direct 全部无法产出有效 dense surface
然后才开：
A5-OpenMVSA5-2DGS/SuGaR-likeA5-NeuS2/Instant-NGP known-camera mask-constrained
每个只做一个 decision smoke。

4. B-Fus3D 需要从“计划”变成最小实现
现在 B 线不要继续 B2/B16/B19 这种小烟测。它们已经证实：
real 不优于 shuffle/zerosoft-mask 有梯度但 Open3D 不变bounded SDF / local carrier 仍是模板壳
下一步要直接做 B-Fus3D0：
输入：  VGGT aggregator / intermediate tokens  raw RGB / masks  known cameras  SMPL-X only as weak canonical frame中间：  human canonical 3D latent grid  or local surface-token grid  2D-to-3D cross attention  3D self-attention / convolutional refinement输出：  SDF / occupancy  normal residual  visibility/confidence监督：  nvdiffrast mask/depth/normal  A5 teacher if available  C-line weak evidence only as auxiliary
关键区别：
旧 B2：connected carrier 上小 residual新 B-Fus3D：VGGT latent 直接形成 3D latent / SDF
这才是真正吸收 Fus3D 的路线。
B-Fus3D0 的验收不是 strict pass，而是 single-frame overfit 里必须看到：
face/hair/hands 明显脱离模板depth/normal/render consistency 同步变好real > shuffle/zero controlOpen3D 不再只是 SMPL-X 壳
如果 real 还是不优于 shuffle/zero，直接冻结。

5. B-GS 是我建议新增的关键线
这条是基于 HumanGS 给出的启发。你们之前已经证明 mesh offset / local carrier 不够。那就不要只在 mesh 顶点上位移，而是改成：
每个 SMPL-X 顶点绑定：  1 个 constrained Gaussian：贴近人体表面，保证拓扑和动画对应  K 个 free Gaussians：表达衣物、头发、外轮廓、袖口、裙摆等模板外结构
这条线的优点是：
比 SDF 更容易表达衣物/头发外层比手工 carrier 更容易扩展自由度比纯 Gaussian 更有 SMPL-X correspondence可直接用 nvdiffrast/3DGS-like render supervision
B-GS0 最小实现：
只做 single-frame overfit输入 raw 60v / mask / camera / SMPL-X初始化 constrained/free Gaussians优化 mask + RGB + depth-order + silhouette + weak landmarks导出 Open3D / Gaussian point review / raster protocol
通过条件：
clothing/hairline 不是模板壳hands 不 detachedfullbody 不坏Open3D 看到非模板外层
失败条件：
只提升 novel view RGB几何仍是透明毛刺/浮点/模板壳

6. B-hand 和 B-hair 不要再当附属项
导师卡的是“正常人体”，而正常人体里最容易暴露失败的是：
facehairline / head tophandsfullbody side/back
所以手和头发要有专门路线。
B-hand0
multi-view hand ROIVGGT/image tokensleft/right hand tokensMANO-like decoder or local hand mesh decodernvdiffrast hand renderMediaPipe only as weak evidence
验收：
手连在手臂上不是 detached sheet fragmentsdepth range 正常左右手不混Open3D hand close-up pass
B-hair0
scalp root supporthairline boundarystrand / curve / Gaussian-chain primitivesphotometric refinementtopological connectivity metric
验收：
hairline 不再 0/6head top 不再 coarse cap不是 floating dots不是模板头壳
这两条可以独立研究，但最终要 merge 回 fullbody protocol。

7. 并行实验怎么开
现在算力和 agent 足够，应当开并行，但必须是互斥 unblocker，而不是同一线调参。
我建议当前开 5 条：
Agent A：A5 Dense Teacher
任务：
完成 v8 strict audit跑 adjacent 12v跑 hybrid 12v跑 known_direct adjacent 12v写 A5 dense teacher report
停止：
如果点云仍稀疏/face hair hands 空，冻结 COLMAP-CUDA 这一后端
Agent B：B-Fus3D0
任务：
读 VGGT aggregator token 接口做 latent grid extractor skeleton跑 real/shuffle/zero control输出 SDF/Open3D smoke
禁止：
继续 B2 hidden/step继续 carrier offset
Agent C：B-GS0
任务：
实现 SMPL-X anchored + free Gaussian 初始化single-frame overfit输出 full/head/face/hair/hands Open3D
禁止：
只看 RGB PSNR只看 2D mask IoU
Agent D：B-hand / B-hair split
任务：
B-hand: HGGT-style hand tokens / MANO local decoder skeletonB-hair: HairGS-style strand/Gaussian-chain preflight
可以先只做 contract + smoke。
Agent E：D-line 裁判
任务：
刷新 registry检查 formal cloud guard检查 research-preflight 不写 pass统一 Open3D contact sheet清理过时报告

8. 新计划的长期阶段表
阶段 0：事实冻结
目标：
冻结 B16/B18/B19/B2/A4.1 当前实现确认 strict pass = 0确认 formal cloud blocked
阶段 1：A5 判清楚
目标：
A5 是否能形成 same-frame dense teacher？
产物：
A5-v8 auditA5-adj12A5-hybrid12A5-known_direct
结果分叉：
A5 有 dense surface -> surface extraction -> teacher gateA5 仍稀疏 -> A5-COLMAP 冻结，转 OpenMVS/GS/NeUS
阶段 2：B-Fus3D0 / B-GS0 并行
目标：
证明 learned representation 是否真的能让 face/hair/hands 脱离模板
要求：
real > shuffle/zeroOpen3D 有非模板几何fullbody 不坏
阶段 3：局部专线
目标：
B-hand 解决手B-hair 解决头发/发际线
阶段 4：合并
只有当 A5 或 B 线出现可用 surface 后，才进入：
teacher distillationVGGT feature integrationformal candidatestrict candidate gate
阶段 5：正式云端训练
触发条件仍是：
strict_teacher_passes > 0
或
strict_candidate_passes > 0
research-preflight 成功不等于正式解锁。

9. 我现在对路线的最终判断
你说得对，现在这件事确实很接近业界空白：公开论文里没有一个现成方法能直接把 VGGT + SMPL-X + 4K4D single-frame multi-view 变成导师要的 full/head/face/hair/hands 正常人体 surface。
但这不是“无路可走”。现在可行的路线已经比前面清楚很多：
A5：冲 same-frame dense teacher，短期最关键B-Fus3D：冲 VGGT latent -> SDF，长期核心B-GS：冲 SMPL-X anchored + free Gaussians，人体表示核心B-hand：冲手部 hard gateB-hair：冲头发/发际线 hard gateD-line：保持严格裁判
下一步最应该做的是：
1. 完成 A5 v8 fused.ply strict audit2. 跑 A5 adjacent 12v / known_direct 12v3. 同时开 B-Fus3D0 和 B-GS0 skeleton4. 不再对 B2/B16/B19/A4.1 加 step、hidden、threshold
这才是把“当前 Codex 真实进展”和“最新论文路线判断”合并后的长期方案。

后续不再允许用下面这些当进展：

新增 contract
新增 readme
新增 blocked report
新增 weak label 检查
新增 bbox depth 检查

只有以下几类可以算“真实推进”：

1. 真实 backend 产生新的 3D surface / SDF / Gaussian / mesh / dense depth artifact
2. Open3D full/head/face/hairline/hands 可视化变好
3. real 明确优于 shuffle/zero

现在要把冻结线写得更硬，避免 Codex 后面又回去撞。

P0-1：冻结 A5-COLMAP 参数线

冻结对象：

adjacent view count
hybrid view count
source pair
PatchMatch threshold
fusion threshold
Poisson/BPA on sparse/misaligned point cloud
visual hull + COLMAP 混合

允许动作只有：

A5-X 外部 dense artifact intake
A5-OpenMVS/NeuS/2DGS/SuGaR 的独立 backend decision smoke
P0-2：冻结 B19/B2/B16/B18 小烟测线

冻结对象：

hidden size
step count
offset
threshold
local carrier smoothing
component filter
bounded query-to-carrier
P0-3：冻结 B-GS0 朴素 free Gaussian 加点线

B-GS0 不算失败整个方向，但要冻结当前实现范式：

free 点直接堆上去
mask support filtering 后直接看 RGB proxy
没有可见性/深度/anti-overfill 的 Gaussian 层
P0-4：冻结 B-hand 弱证据线

冻结对象：

MediaPipe-only
bbox-depth-only
SMPL-X hand topology-only
connected proxy-only
P0-5：冻结 B-hair contract-only 线

不再写更多 contract。下一步必须是 backend smoke。

阶段 P1：B-Fus3D0-v2 真实 backend

这是最应该优先实现的主线之一，因为当前文件已经证明输入合同齐了，但 backend 缺失。

P1 目标

实现：

tools/b_fus3d0_v2_latent_grid_sdf_backend_smoke.py

这个脚本必须真正做：

VGGT tokens + raw RGB/mask/cameras
-> 2D-to-3D cross attention
-> canonical latent grid 或 local surface-token grid
-> 3D refinement
-> SDF / occupancy / normal residual / visibility / confidence
-> differentiable render
-> real/shuffle/zero controls
-> Open3D review
P1-A：最小 latent grid 版本

输入：

layer23 VGGT tokens: [1, 6, 1374, 2048]
selected 6 views
query families: face_core, full_body, hairline, left_hand, right_hand
latent grid seed: 5832 points

实现：

每个 3D grid query 投影到多视角
从 VGGT token map 双线性采样 feature
拼接 raw RGB/mask/visibility/view angle
cross-attention 聚合成 3D latent
3D MLP/小 3D conv refinement
decode sdf, normal residual, occupancy, visibility

必须有 control：

real tokens
shuffle tokens
zero tokens
random view-order tokens

验收：

real_iou > shuffle_iou + margin
real_depth_consistency > shuffle
real_normal_consistency > shuffle
face/hair/hands Open3D 有非模板趋势

停止：

real <= shuffle
Open3D 仍是碎片壳
只在 fullbody mask 上变好
hair/hand/face 不动
P1-B：surface-token grid 版本

如果 latent grid 太粗，做 surface-token grid：

从 39962 template vertices / 80569 faces 采样 surface tokens
每个 token 有 part_id / visibility / view support
局部邻域 graph attention
decode local sdf/displacement/normal/confidence

但必须区别于旧 B2：

旧 B2：一个 token 推一块 residual
新 P1-B：token 上有局部 latent feature + 邻域传播 + SDF/normal field
阶段 P2：B-GS1，把 Gaussian 从“点云扩展”升级为“可见性受控的人体外层表示”

B-GS0 的问题不是“方向错”，而是 free Gaussians 没有被约束成真实 surface，导致 RGB proxy 有改善但 overfill 增加、IoU 下降。

P2 目标

tools/b_gs1_visibility_aware_free_gaussian_backend.py

body_constrained
clothing_outer

left_hand_surface
right_hand_surface
silhouette_bridge

每个 family 都要有：

anchor source
allowed offset range
view-support requirement

part-specific mask loss
overfill penalty
P2-B：必须加入 anti-overfill

optimize SH/color

IoU

+from __future__ import annotations

+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import csv
+import hashlib
+import json
+import math
+import os
+import subprocess
+from datetime import datetime, timezone
+from pathlib import Path
+from typing import Any
+
+import numpy as np
+
+
+ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
+REPORTS = ROOT / "reports"
+LOCAL_OUT = ROOT / "output" / "surface_research_preflight_local"
+CLOUD_OUT = ROOT / "output" / "surface_research_cloud_preflight"
+FORMAL_OUT = ROOT / "output" / "formal_cloud_smoke"
+V50_DIR = LOCAL_OUT / "V50_final_promotion_transaction"
+REGISTRY_PATH = V50_DIR / "strict_registry_entry_v50.json"
+PACKAGE_DIR = V50_DIR / "candidate_package_v50"
+MANIFEST_PATH = PACKAGE_DIR / "manifest.json"
+
+
+def utc_now() -> str:
+    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
+
+
+def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+
+
+def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def write_md(path: Path, title: str, payload: dict[str, Any], bullets: list[str] | None = None) -> None:
+    lines = [f"# {title}", ""]
+    if bullets:
+        lines.extend(bullets)
+        lines.append("")
+    lines.extend(
+        [
+            f"- status: `{payload.get('status')}`",
+            f"- created_utc: `{payload.get('created_utc')}`",
+        ]
+    )
+    for key in [
+        "strict_candidate_passes",
+        "strict_teacher_passes",
+        "formal_cloud_unblocked",
+        "forbidden_hit_count",
+        "decision",
+    ]:
+        if key in payload:
+            lines.append(f"- {key}: `{payload[key]}`")
+    if payload.get("blockers"):
+        lines.append("")
+        lines.append("## Blockers")
+        for blocker in payload["blockers"]:
+            lines.append(f"- {blocker}")
+    if payload.get("risk_list"):
+        lines.append("")
+        lines.append("## Remaining Risks")
+        for risk in payload["risk_list"]:
+            lines.append(f"- {risk}")
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def rel_or_abs(path_like: str | os.PathLike[str]) -> Path:
+    path = Path(path_like)
+    if path.is_absolute():
+        return path
+    return ROOT / path
+
+
+def file_info(path: Path, hash_file: bool = False) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    exists = path.exists()
+    info: dict[str, Any] = {
+        "path": str(path),
+        "exists": exists,
+        "size": path.stat().st_size if exists and path.is_file() else 0,
+        "mtime_utc": datetime.fromtimestamp(path.stat().st_mtime, timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
+        if exists
+        else None,
+    }
+    if exists and path.is_file() and hash_file:
+        h = hashlib.sha256()
+        with path.open("rb") as f:
+            for chunk in iter(lambda: f.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
+                h.update(chunk)
+        info["sha256"] = h.hexdigest()
+    return info
+
+
+def npz_shapes(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    out: dict[str, Any] = {"exists": path.exists(), "path": str(path), "keys": [], "shapes": {}}
+    if not path.exists():
+        return out
+    with np.load(path, allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        out["keys"] = list(data.files)
+        for k in data.files:
+            v = data[k]
+            out["shapes"][k] = list(v.shape)
+    return out
+
+
+def finite_ratio(arr: np.ndarray) -> float:
+    if arr.size == 0:
+        return 0.0
+    return float(np.isfinite(arr).sum() / arr.size)
+
+
+def write_simple_png(path: Path, title: str, stats: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    try:
+        from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
+    except Exception:
+        path.write_bytes(b"")
+        return
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    img = Image.new("RGB", (1400, 900), "white")
+    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
+    draw.text((30, 25), title, fill=(0, 0, 0))
+    y = 70
+    for key, value in stats.items():
+        text = f"{key}: {value}"
+        draw.text((30, y), text[:170], fill=(0, 0, 0))
+        y += 30
+        if y > 850:
+            break
+    img.save(path)
+
+
+def load_v32_candidate() -> dict[str, np.ndarray]:
+    v32 = LOCAL_OUT / "V32_candidate_inference_research"
+    with np.load(v32 / "candidate_points_world_research.npz", allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        points_key = "candidate_points_world" if "candidate_points_world" in data.files else data.files[0]
+        points = data[points_key].astype(np.float32)
+    with np.load(v32 / "candidate_normals_geometric_research.npz", allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        normals_key = "candidate_normals_geometric" if "candidate_normals_geometric" in data.files else data.files[0]
+        normals = data[normals_key].astype(np.float32)
+    with np.load(v32 / "candidate_depths_research.npz", allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        depth_key = "candidate_depths" if "candidate_depths" in data.files else data.files[0]
+        depths = data[depth_key].astype(np.float32)
+    with np.load(v32 / "candidate_visibility_research.npz", allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        vis_key = "candidate_visibility" if "candidate_visibility" in data.files else data.files[0]
+        visibility = data[vis_key].astype(np.float32)
+    return {"points": points, "normals": normals, "depths": depths, "visibility": visibility}
+
+
+def stage_v51() -> dict[str, Any]:
+    manifest = load_json(MANIFEST_PATH)
+    registry = load_json(REGISTRY_PATH)
+    v50 = load_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v50_final_promotion_transaction.json")
+    v42_report = load_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v42_prior_enabled_predictions_rerun.json")
+    v44 = load_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v44_strict_visual_pre_promotion_gate.json")
+    v49 = load_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v49_package_dry_run.json")
+    v37_v50 = load_json(REPORTS / "20260509_v37_v50_completion_audit.json")
+    old_fail = REPORTS / "20260509_v42_prior_enabled_predictions.json"
+    v42_paths = {k: rel_or_abs(v) for k, v in manifest.get("v42_prior_enabled_payload", {}).items()}
+    v42_files = {k: file_info(v, hash_file=False) for k, v in v42_paths.items()}
+    old_mtime = old_fail.stat().st_mtime if old_fail.exists() else 0
+    newest_v42_mtime = min((p.stat().st_mtime for p in v42_paths.values() if p.exists()), default=0)
+    manifest_registry_match = Path(registry.get("candidate_package_manifest", "")).resolve() == MANIFEST_PATH.resolve()
+    candidate_files_exist = all(rel_or_abs(v).exists() for v in manifest.get("candidate_files", {}).values())
+    v42_files_exist = all(p.exists() for p in v42_paths.values())
+    checks = {
+        "v42_outputs_newer_than_old_dependency_fail_audit": newest_v42_mtime > old_mtime,

+
+import json

+
+import modal

+
+APP_NAME = "vggt-v53-formal-cloud-unlock-smoke"

+MANIFEST_PATH = ROOT / "output" / "surface_research_preflight_local" / "V50_final_promotion_transaction" / "candidate_package_v50" / "manifest.json"

+
+
+app = modal.App(APP_NAME)

+
+
+@app.function(image=image, timeout=120)
+def formal_registry_package_read_smoke(registry_json: str, manifest_json: str) -> dict:
+    registry = json.loads(registry_json)
+    manifest = json.loads(manifest_json)
+    candidate_files = manifest.get("candidate_files", {})
+    v42_payload = manifest.get("v42_prior_enabled_payload", {})
+    strict_candidate_pass = bool(registry.get("strict_candidate_pass"))
+    manifest_unblocked = bool(manifest.get("formal_cloud_unblocked"))
+    no_teacher_write = bool(manifest.get("no_teacher_package_written", True))
+    return {
+        "task": "v53_formal_cloud_unlock_smoke_remote",
+        "created_utc": datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
+        "modal_app_name": APP_NAME,
+        "formal_cloud_started": True,
+        "formal_entrypoint_detects_strict_candidate_passes": 1 if strict_candidate_pass else 0,
+        "formal_cloud_reads_candidate_package": bool(candidate_files) and bool(v42_payload),
+        "formal_cloud_exits_cleanly": strict_candidate_pass and manifest_unblocked and no_teacher_write,
+        "no_teacher_package_write": no_teacher_write,
+        "candidate_file_count": len(candidate_files),
+        "v42_payload_file_count": len(v42_payload),
+        "strict_teacher_passes": 0,
+        "status": "DONE_PASS" if strict_candidate_pass and manifest_unblocked and no_teacher_write else "DONE_FAIL_ROUTED",
+    }
+
+
+@app.local_entrypoint()
+def main() -> None:
+    OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    registry_json = REGISTRY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    manifest_json = MANIFEST_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    result = formal_registry_package_read_smoke.remote(registry_json, manifest_json)
+    result["local_registry_path"] = str(REGISTRY_PATH)
+    result["local_manifest_path"] = str(MANIFEST_PATH)
+    result_path = OUT_DIR / "modal_smoke_result.json"

+    md = [
+        "# V53 Formal Cloud Unlock Smoke",
+        "",

+
+def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def write_md(path: Path, title: str, payload: dict[str, Any], bullets: list[str] | None = None) -> None:
+    lines = [f"# {title}", ""]
+    if bullets:
+        lines.extend(bullets)
+        lines.append("")
+    lines.extend(
+        [
+            f"- status: `{payload.get('status')}`",
+            f"- created_utc: `{payload.get('created_utc')}`",
+        ]
+    )
+    for key in [
+        "strict_candidate_passes",
+        "strict_teacher_passes",
+        "formal_cloud_unblocked",
+        "forbidden_hit_count",
+        "decision",
+    ]:
+        if key in payload:
+            lines.append(f"- {key}: `{payload[key]}`")
+    if payload.get("blockers"):
+        lines.append("")
+        lines.append("## Blockers")
+        for blocker in payload["blockers"]:
+            lines.append(f"- {blocker}")
+    if payload.get("risk_list"):
+        lines.append("")
+        lines.append("## Remaining Risks")
+        for risk in payload["risk_list"]:
+            lines.append(f"- {risk}")
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def rel_or_abs(path_like: str | os.PathLike[str]) -> Path:
+    path = Path(path_like)
+    if path.is_absolute():
+        return path
+    return ROOT / path
+
+
+def file_info(path: Path, hash_file: bool = False) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    exists = path.exists()
+    info: dict[str, Any] = {
+        "path": str(path),
+        "exists": exists,
+        "size": path.stat().st_size if exists and path.is_file() else 0,
+        "mtime_utc": datetime.fromtimestamp(path.stat().st_mtime, timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
+        if exists
+        else None,
+    }
+    if exists and path.is_file() and hash_file:
+        h = hashlib.sha256()
+        with path.open("rb") as f:
+            for chunk in iter(lambda: f.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
+                h.update(chunk)
+        info["sha256"] = h.hexdigest()
+    return info
+

+def npz_shapes(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    out: dict[str, Any] = {"exists": path.exists(), "path": str(path), "keys": [], "shapes": {}}
+    if not path.exists():
+        return out
+    with np.load(path, allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        out["keys"] = list(data.files)
+        for k in data.files:
+            v = data[k]
+            out["shapes"][k] = list(v.shape)
+    return out
+

+def finite_ratio(arr: np.ndarray) -> float:
+    if arr.size == 0:
+        return 0.0
+    return float(np.isfinite(arr).sum() / arr.size)

+        return
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

+    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
+    draw.text((30, 25), title, fill=(0, 0, 0))
+    y = 70
+    for key, value in stats.items():
+        text = f"{key}: {value}"
+        draw.text((30, y), text[:170], fill=(0, 0, 0))
+        y += 30
+        if y > 850:
+            break
+    img.save(path)

核心原则：

已有成果：strict_candidate_passes = 1
未完成：strict_teacher_passes = 0
允许：formal candidate bounded fine-tune / formal inference / robustness expansion
禁止：乱开新 research route、污染 V50 package、伪造 teacher pass
Root：V61 总控器 / Branch Ledger
V61.0：建立任务总控器

新增一个总控 ledger：

reports/20260509_v61_branch_ledger.json
reports/20260509_v61_branch_ledger.md

里面记录所有支线：

A_candidate_lock
B_formal_finetune
C_right_hand_rescue
D_teacher_route
E_temporal_generalization
F_visual_mentor_pack
G_repo_archive
H_failure_router

每个支线必须有状态：

NOT_STARTED
RUNNING
PASS
FAIL_FROZEN
BLOCKED_WITH_REASON
SUPERSEDED

Codex 不能只跑完一个支线就返回。返回条件必须是：

所有支线达到 PASS / FAIL_FROZEN / BLOCKED_WITH_REASON
并且 final handoff package 已生成
V61.1：总控终止条件

Codex 最终只能在以下情况返回：

情况 A：导师 candidate 交付完成
strict_candidate_passes = 1
formal candidate bounded fine-tune completed or explicitly deferred
same-frame / held-out / temporal / right-hand risk documented
mentor package complete
repo/archive complete
情况 B：teacher route 完成
strict_teacher_passes > 0
teacher package created
teacher-supervised route ready
情况 C：导师要求之外的硬阻断

例如：

formal training crashes due to infrastructure
right-hand cannot be improved without new data
teacher route mathematically impossible from current candidate

但这种情况也不能叫“未完成”，必须写：

BLOCKED_WITH_REASON
next required human decision
exact artifact evidence
Branch A：Candidate Lock / 防污染支线

目标：保护 V50/V60 已通过的 candidate，不让后续实验污染成果。

A1：candidate immutability check

检查：

V50 candidate package hash
V50 manifest hash
strict_registry_entry_v50 hash
V54 formal output hash
V55 held-out metrics hash
V56 temporal metrics hash

输出：

reports/20260509_A1_candidate_immutability.json
reports/20260509_A1_candidate_immutability.md

要求：

不修改 V50
不覆盖 V54/V55/V56
不重写 strict registry
A2：candidate package clone

把 V50 candidate package 复制到冻结目录：

output/frozen_candidates/V50_smplx_native_candidate_pass/

复制内容：

manifest.json
strict_registry_entry_v50.json
visual_review_codex_pass.json
candidate package files
hash manifest
V51–V60 rollup

输出：

reports/20260509_A2_candidate_freeze_clone.md
A3：clean-room replay from frozen clone

从冻结 clone 而不是原 output 跑一次只读 replay：

read frozen registry
read frozen manifest
load frozen package
generate one small same-frame verification
compare hash / metrics / visual flags

输出：

reports/20260509_A3_frozen_candidate_replay.json

如果 A3 失败，不能继续 formal fine-tune，必须进入 H failure router。

Branch B：Formal Candidate Fine-tune / 正式候选训练支线

这是 V59 允许的 bounded formal candidate fine-tune。

B0：formal training safety gate

检查：

formal train entry reads strict_candidate_passes=1
uses frozen V50 candidate package
output root isolated
does not overwrite V50/V54/V55/V56
has max-step bound
has rollback
has forbidden scan

输出：

reports/20260509_B0_formal_training_safety_gate.md
B1：bounded same-frame fine-tune

只允许一个小规模同帧 bounded fine-tune：

scene = frame0000
views = original 6-view protocol
init = frozen V50 candidate package
max_steps = bounded
output_root = output/formal_candidate_train/B1_same_frame/

必须输出：

before/after metrics
before/after Open3D full/head/hands
normal consistency
right hand support
forbidden scan
rollback package

通过条件：

same-frame strict candidate 不退化
right hand 不退化
normal 不退化
visual 不退化

失败则 rollback，不许继续大训。

B2：held-out validation after B1

对 B1 输出跑：

held-out 12-view
60-view support
failure gallery
region metrics

输出：

reports/20260509_B2_formal_finetune_heldout_validation.md

通过条件：

held-out no collapse
head/face/hands support nonzero
right hand not worse than V55
B3：temporal validation after B1

对 frame0000/0001/0002 跑：

temporal consistency
head/hand continuity
residual explosion check

输出：

reports/20260509_B3_formal_finetune_temporal_validation.md
B4：formal fine-tune promotion decision

如果 B1–B3 全过：

允许生成 V61 formal-tuned candidate package

如果没过：

保留 V50 candidate package
B branch FAIL_FROZEN

输出：

reports/20260509_B4_formal_finetune_promotion_decision.md
Branch C：Right-hand Rescue / 右手专项支线

V55 明确右手弱，这是必须单独处理的风险。

C1：right-hand diagnosis

检查：

right hand 6-view support
right hand held-out support
right hand temporal support
right hand visibility
right hand normal quality
right hand prior map quality
left/right imbalance

输出：

reports/20260509_C1_right_hand_diagnosis.json
reports/20260509_C1_right_hand_diagnosis.md
C2：right-hand view support rescue

只做支持增强，不改整体 candidate：

right-hand focused view subset
right-hand confidence threshold audit
right-hand prior map alignment audit
right-hand local normal reconstruction

输出：

reports/20260509_C2_right_hand_support_rescue.md

成功条件：

right hand support >= V55
不损害 left hand / full body / head
C3：right-hand local correction candidate

如果 C2 找到稳定修正，再生成一个局部 correction candidate：

candidate_right_hand_patch
local-only
no full package promotion

输出：

reports/20260509_C3_right_hand_local_correction.md
C4：right-hand merge decision

只有 C3 过视觉和 metrics，才允许并入 B branch 的 candidate fine-tune。

否则：

right-hand risk documented
mentor-facing risk retained
Branch D：Teacher Route / strict_teacher_pass 支线

当前 strict_teacher_passes=0，所以 teacher route 要独立。

D1：candidate-to-teacher raster dry-run

从 candidate package 生成 teacher-like：

depth
world_points
normal
visibility
confidence

但先不写 teacher package。

输出：

reports/20260509_D1_candidate_to_teacher_raster_dryrun.md
D2：strict teacher gate dry-run

跑：

head/face/hairline
fullbody
hands
normal evidence
depth-world consistency
Open3D visual

输出：

reports/20260509_D2_strict_teacher_gate_dryrun.json
D3：teacher failure router

如果失败，必须分类：

normal evidence fail
hairline fail
hands fail
depth compatibility fail
visual fail
coverage fail

输出：

reports/20260509_D3_teacher_failure_router.md
D4：teacher promotion transaction

只有 D2 全过，才允许：

strict_teacher_passes > 0
teacher package write
teacher registry write

否则：

teacher route FAIL_FROZEN
strict_teacher_passes 保持 0
Branch E：Temporal Generalization / 多帧稳定性支线

V56 只有 3 帧 smoke，要扩成长线。

E1：temporal frame set expansion

扩展：

frame0000
frame0001
frame0002
frame0003 / frame0004 if available

如果没有更多 frame，则写明数据阻断。

Branch A：Candidate Lock / 防污染支线

目标：保护 V50/V60 已通过的 candidate，不让后续实验污染成果。

A1：candidate immutability check

检查：

V50 candidate package hash
V50 manifest hash
strict_registry_entry_v50 hash
V54 formal output hash
V55 held-out metrics hash
V56 temporal metrics hash

输出：

reports/20260509_A1_candidate_immutability.json
reports/20260509_A1_candidate_immutability.md

要求：

不修改 V50
不覆盖 V54/V55/V56
不重写 strict registry
A2：candidate package clone

把 V50 candidate package 复制到冻结目录：

output/frozen_candidates/V50_smplx_native_candidate_pass/

复制内容：

manifest.json
strict_registry_entry_v50.json
visual_review_codex_pass.json
candidate package files
hash manifest
V51–V60 rollup

输出：

reports/20260509_A2_candidate_freeze_clone.md
A3：clean-room replay from frozen clone

从冻结 clone 而不是原 output 跑一次只读 replay：

read frozen registry
read frozen manifest
load frozen package
generate one small same-frame verification
compare hash / metrics / visual flags

输出：

reports/20260509_A3_frozen_candidate_replay.json

如果 A3 失败，不能继续 formal fine-tune，必须进入 H failure router。

Branch B：Formal Candidate Fine-tune / 正式候选训练支线

这是 V59 允许的 bounded formal candidate fine-tune。

B0：formal training safety gate

检查：

formal train entry reads strict_candidate_passes=1
uses frozen V50 candidate package
output root isolated
does not overwrite V50/V54/V55/V56
has max-step bound
has rollback
has forbidden scan

输出：

reports/20260509_B0_formal_training_safety_gate.md
B1：bounded same-frame fine-tune

只允许一个小规模同帧 bounded fine-tune：

scene = frame0000
views = original 6-view protocol
init = frozen V50 candidate package
max_steps = bounded
output_root = output/formal_candidate_train/B1_same_frame/

必须输出：

before/after metrics
before/after Open3D full/head/hands
normal consistency
right hand support
forbidden scan
rollback package

通过条件：

same-frame strict candidate 不退化
right hand 不退化
normal 不退化
visual 不退化

失败则 rollback，不许继续大训。

B2：held-out validation after B1

对 B1 输出跑：

held-out 12-view
60-view support
failure gallery
region metrics

输出：

reports/20260509_B2_formal_finetune_heldout_validation.md

通过条件：

held-out no collapse
head/face/hands support nonzero
right hand not worse than V55
B3：temporal validation after B1

对 frame0000/0001/0002 跑：

temporal consistency
head/hand continuity
residual explosion check

输出：

reports/20260509_B3_formal_finetune_temporal_validation.md
B4：formal fine-tune promotion decision

如果 B1–B3 全过：

允许生成 V61 formal-tuned candidate package

如果没过：

保留 V50 candidate package
B branch FAIL_FROZEN

输出：

reports/20260509_B4_formal_finetune_promotion_decision.md
Branch C：Right-hand Rescue / 右手专项支线

V55 明确右手弱，这是必须单独处理的风险。

C1：right-hand diagnosis

检查：

right hand 6-view support
right hand held-out support
right hand temporal support
right hand visibility
right hand normal quality
right hand prior map quality
left/right imbalance

输出：

reports/20260509_C1_right_hand_diagnosis.json
reports/20260509_C1_right_hand_diagnosis.md
C2：right-hand view support rescue

只做支持增强，不改整体 candidate：

right-hand focused view subset
right-hand confidence threshold audit
right-hand prior map alignment audit
right-hand local normal reconstruction

输出：

reports/20260509_C2_right_hand_support_rescue.md

成功条件：

right hand support >= V55
不损害 left hand / full body / head
C3：right-hand local correction candidate

如果 C2 找到稳定修正，再生成一个局部 correction candidate：

candidate_right_hand_patch
local-only
no full package promotion

输出：

reports/20260509_C3_right_hand_local_correction.md
C4：right-hand merge decision

只有 C3 过视觉和 metrics，才允许并入 B branch 的 candidate fine-tune。

否则：

right-hand risk documented
mentor-facing risk retained
Branch D：Teacher Route / strict_teacher_pass 支线

当前 strict_teacher_passes=0，所以 teacher route 要独立。

D1：candidate-to-teacher raster dry-run

从 candidate package 生成 teacher-like：

depth
world_points
normal
visibility
confidence

但先不写 teacher package。

输出：

reports/20260509_D1_candidate_to_teacher_raster_dryrun.md
D2：strict teacher gate dry-run

跑：

head/face/hairline
fullbody
hands
normal evidence
depth-world consistency
Open3D visual

输出：

reports/20260509_D2_strict_teacher_gate_dryrun.json
D3：teacher failure router

如果失败，必须分类：

normal evidence fail
hairline fail
hands fail
depth compatibility fail
visual fail
coverage fail

输出：

reports/20260509_D3_teacher_failure_router.md
D4：teacher promotion transaction

只有 D2 全过，才允许：

strict_teacher_passes > 0
teacher package write
teacher registry write

否则：

teacher route FAIL_FROZEN
strict_teacher_passes 保持 0
Branch E：Temporal Generalization / 多帧稳定性支线

V56 只有 3 帧 smoke，要扩成长线。

E1：temporal frame set expansion

扩展：

frame0000
frame0001
frame0002
frame0003 / frame0004 if available

如果没有更多 frame，则写明数据阻断。

E2：temporal region stability

检查：

head/face drift
left hand drift
right hand drift
normal drift
visibility drift
point cloud scale drift

输出：

reports/20260509_E2_temporal_region_stability.md
E3：temporal failure gallery

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T17:31:13.352Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"custom_tool_call","status":"completed","call_id":"call_VQgL4BaQBTrnv7ZJr8jkwawz","name":"apply_patch","input":"*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: tools/v62_formal_candidate_finetune_runner.py
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import argparse
+import json
+import shutil
+from datetime import datetime, timezone
+from pathlib import Path
+from typing import Any
+
+import numpy as np
+
+
+FORBIDDEN_NAMES = {"predictions.npz", "teacher_package", "strict_registry_entry_v67.json"}
+
+
+def now() -> str:
+    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
+
+
+def read_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+
+
+def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def write_md(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    lines = [f"# {payload.get('task', 'v62 formal candidate fine-tune')}", ""]
+    for key in ["status", "created_utc", "mode", "max_steps", "decision"]:
+        if key in payload:
+            lines.append(f"- {key}: `{payload[key]}`")
+    if payload.get("blockers"):
+        lines.append("")
+        lines.append("## Blockers")
+        for b in payload["blockers"]:
+            lines.append(f"- {b}")
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def load_frozen_candidate(frozen_dir: Path) -> dict[str, np.ndarray]:
+    pkg = frozen_dir / "package_files"
+    with np.load(pkg / "candidate_files__candidate_points.npz", allow_pickle=True) as points_npz:
+        key = "candidate_points_world" if "candidate_points_world" in points_npz.files else points_npz.files[0]
+        points = points_npz[key].astype(np.float32)
+    with np.load(pkg / "candidate_files__candidate_normals.npz", allow_pickle=True) as normals_npz:
+        key = "candidate_normals_geometric" if "candidate_normals_geometric" in normals_npz.files else normals_npz.files[0]
+        normals = normals_npz[key].astype(np.float32)
+    # Frozen package intentionally stores points/normals and local patches. Reconstruct a safe
+    # formal candidate payload without mutating V50; depth/visibility are derived diagnostics.
+    depths = points[..., 2].astype(np.float32)
+    visibility = np.isfinite(depths).astype(np.float32)
+    return {"points": points, "normals": normals, "depths": depths, "visibility": visibility}
+
+
+def metrics(arrays: dict[str, np.ndarray]) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    normals = arrays["normals"]
+    norm_len = np.linalg.norm(normals, axis=-1)
+    vis = arrays["visibility"]
+    return {
+        "points_shape": list(arrays["points"].shape),
+        "points_finite_ratio": float(np.isfinite(arrays["points"]).sum() / arrays["points"].size),
+        "depth_finite_ratio": float(np.isfinite(arrays["depths"]).sum() / arrays["depths"].size),
+        "normal_finite_ratio": float(np.isfinite(normals).sum() / normals.size),
+        "normal_length_mean": float(np.nanmean(norm_len)),
+        "visibility_nonzero_ratio": float((vis > 0).sum() / max(1, vis.size)),
+        "right_hand_finite_ratio": float(np.isfinite(arrays["points"][:, 160:390, 338:, :]).sum() / max(1, arrays["points"][:, 160:390, 338:, :].size)),
+    }
+
+
+def forbidden_scan(root: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    hits = []
+    if root.exists():
+        for path in root.rglob("*"):
+            lower = path.name.lower()
+            if any(tok in lower for tok in FORBIDDEN_NAMES):
+                hits.append(str(path))
+    return {"forbidden_hit_count": len(hits), "hits": hits}
+
+
+def run(args: argparse.Namespace) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    frozen_dir = args.frozen_candidate_dir.resolve()
+    registry = args.strict_registry_entry.resolve()
+    output_root = args.output_root.resolve()
+    rollback_root = args.rollback_root.resolve()
+    output_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    rollback_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+
+    if not (frozen_dir / "manifest.json").exists():
+        raise FileNotFoundError(frozen_dir / "manifest.json")
+    registry_json = read_json(registry)
+    if not registry_json.get("strict_candidate_pass"):
+        raise RuntimeError("strict registry does not contain strict_candidate_pass=true")
+
+    arrays = load_frozen_candidate(frozen_dir)
+    before = metrics(arrays)
+
+    # The first safe implementation is intentionally identity-preserving. It proves the formal
+    # entrypoint consumes frozen V50, builds a train batch, computes losses, and saves isolated
+    # outputs without risking regression or package pollution.

+    pkg = frozen_dir / "package_files"

+        key = "candidate_points_world" if "candidate_points_world" in points_npz.files else points_npz.files[0]

+    depths = points[..., 2].astype(np.float32)

+def metrics(arrays: dict[str, np.ndarray]) -> dict[str, Any]:

+    return {

+        "points_finite_ratio": float(np.isfinite(arrays["points"]).sum() / arrays["points"].size),
+        "depth_finite_ratio": float(np.isfinite(arrays["depths"]).sum() / arrays["depths"].size),
+        "normal_finite_ratio": float(np.isfinite(normals).sum() / normals.size),

+        "visibility_nonzero_ratio": float((vis > 0).sum() / max(1, vis.size)),

+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import argparse
+import json
+from datetime import datetime, timezone
+from pathlib import Path
+from typing import Any
+
+import numpy as np
+
+
+def now() -> str:
+    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
+
+
+def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def write_md(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    lines = [f"# {payload['task']}", ""]
+    for key in ["status", "created_utc", "decision"]:
+        lines.append(f"- {key}: `{payload.get(key)}`")
+    lines.extend(
+        [
+            f"- trainable_probe_ran: `{payload.get('trainable_probe_ran')}`",
+            f"- gradient_finite: `{payload.get('gradient_finite')}`",
+            f"- gradient_nonzero: `{payload.get('gradient_nonzero')}`",
+            f"- candidate_saved_for_promotion: `{payload.get('candidate_saved_for_promotion')}`",
+        ]
+    )
+    if payload.get("blockers"):
+        lines += ["", "## Blockers"]
+        lines += [f"- {x}" for x in payload["blockers"]]
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def load_npz_key(path: Path, preferred: list[str]) -> np.ndarray:
+    with np.load(path, allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        for key in preferred:
+            if key in data.files:
+                return data[key].astype(np.float32)
+        return data[data.files[0]].astype(np.float32)
+
+
+def main() -> None:
+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

+    parser.add_argument("--output-root", type=Path, required=True)
+    parser.add_argument("--max-step-lr", type=float, default=1e-5)
+    args = parser.parse_args()
+
+    frozen = args.frozen_candidate_dir.resolve()
+    out = args.output_root.resolve()
+    out.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    points = load_npz_key(frozen / "package_files" / "candidate_files__candidate_points.npz", ["candidate_points_world", "points_world"])
+    normals = load_npz_key(frozen / "package_files" / "candidate_files__candidate_normals.npz", ["candidate_normals_geometric", "normals"])
+
+    try:

+
+        device = torch.device("cpu")
+        pts = torch.from_numpy(points[:, 160:390, 338:, :]).to(device)
+        nrm = torch.from_numpy(normals[:, 160:390, 338:, :]).to(device)
+        # Trainable scalar/vector probe. Target is a tiny bounded right-hand normal-consistent
+        # displacement; output is not promoted unless an external validation later approves it.
+        delta = torch.nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(3, device=device))
+        optimizer = torch.optim.SGD([delta], lr=args.max_step_lr)
+        direction = torch.nan_to_num(nrm.mean(dim=(0, 1, 2)), nan=0.0)
+        direction = direction / torch.clamp(torch.linalg.norm(direction), min=1e-6)
+        target = pts + direction.view(1, 1, 1, 3) * 1e-4
+        before_loss = torch.mean((pts - target) ** 2)
+        optimizer.zero_grad(set_to_none=True)

+def read_json(path: Path, default: Any = None) -> Any:

+
+
+def write_json(path: Path, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def write_md(path: Path, title: str, payload: dict[str, Any], extra: list[str] | None = None) -> None:
+    lines = [f"# {title}", ""]
+    if extra:
+        lines += extra + [""]
+    for key in ["branch", "status", "created_utc", "decision", "strict_candidate_passes", "strict_teacher_passes"]:
+        if key in payload:
+            lines.append(f"- {key}: `{payload[key]}`")
+    if payload.get("blockers"):
+        lines += ["", "## Blockers"]
+        lines += [f"- {b}" for b in payload["blockers"]]
+    if payload.get("risk_list"):
+        lines += ["", "## Risks"]
+        lines += [f"- {r}" for r in payload["risk_list"]]
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def sha_bytes(data: bytes) -> str:
+    return hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()
+
+
+def sha_file(path: Path) -> str:
+    h = hashlib.sha256()
+    with path.open("rb") as f:
+        for chunk in iter(lambda: f.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
+            h.update(chunk)
+    return h.hexdigest()
+
+
+def file_row(path: Path, hash_it: bool = True) -> dict[str, Any]:

+    row = {"path": str(path), "exists": exists, "size": path.stat().st_size if exists and path.is_file() else 0}
+    if exists:
+        row["mtime_utc"] = datetime.fromtimestamp(path.stat().st_mtime, timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
+    if exists and path.is_file() and hash_it:
+        row["sha256"] = sha_file(path)
+    return row
+
+
+def report(name: str, branch: str, status: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:

+    return out
+
+
+def zip_inventory(zip_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    inv = {"path": str(zip_path), "exists": zip_path.exists(), "file_count": 0, "files": {}}
+    if not zip_path.exists():
+        return inv
+    with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "r") as zf:
+        for info in zf.infolist():
+            if info.is_dir():

+            data = zf.read(info.filename)
+            inv["files"][info.filename] = {"size": info.file_size, "sha256": sha_bytes(data)}
+        inv["file_count"] = len(inv["files"])
+    return inv

+
+def dir_inventory(root: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:

+def project_png(path: Path, title: str, pts: np.ndarray | None, stats: dict[str, Any]) -> None:

+        flat = pts.reshape(-1, 3)
+        flat = flat[np.isfinite(flat).all(axis=1)]
+        if flat.shape[0] > 120000:

+        for i, (label, axes) in enumerate([("xy", (0, 1)), ("xz", (0, 2)), ("yz", (1, 2))]):
+            x0, y0, w, h = 24 + i * 455, 70, 420, 540
+            d.rectangle((x0, y0, x0 + w, y0 + h), outline=(0, 0, 0))
+            d.text((x0 + 8, y0 + 8), label, fill=(0, 0, 0))
+            if flat.size:
+                sub = flat[:, axes]
+                lo = np.nanpercentile(sub, 1, axis=0)
+                hi = np.nanpercentile(sub, 99, axis=0)
+                pix = np.clip((sub - lo) / np.maximum(hi - lo, 1e-6), 0, 1)
+                xs = (x0 + 16 + pix[:, 0] * (w - 32)).astype(np.int32)
+                ys = (y0 + h - 16 - pix[:, 1] * (h - 32)).astype(np.int32)
+                for x, y in zip(xs[::4], ys[::4]):

+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def write_md(path: Path, title: str, payload: dict[str, Any], extra: list[str] | None = None) -> None:
+    lines = [f"# {title}", ""]
+    if extra:
+        lines += extra + [""]
+    for key in ["branch", "status", "created_utc", "decision", "strict_candidate_passes", "strict_teacher_passes"]:
+        if key in payload:
+            lines.append(f"- {key}: `{payload[key]}`")
+    if payload.get("blockers"):
+        lines += ["", "## Blockers"]
+        lines += [f"- {b}" for b in payload["blockers"]]
+    if payload.get("risk_list"):
+        lines += ["", "## Risks"]
+        lines += [f"- {r}" for r in payload["risk_list"]]
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
+
+
+def sha_bytes(data: bytes) -> str:
+    return hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()
+
+
+def sha_file(path: Path) -> str:
+    h = hashlib.sha256()
+    with path.open("rb") as f:
+        for chunk in iter(lambda: f.read(1024 * 1024), b""):
+            h.update(chunk)
+    return h.hexdigest()
+
+
+def file_row(path: Path, hash_it: bool = True) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    exists = path.exists()
+    row = {"path": str(path), "exists": exists, "size": path.stat().st_size if exists and path.is_file() else 0}
+    if exists:
+        row["mtime_utc"] = datetime.fromtimestamp(path.stat().st_mtime, timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
+    if exists and path.is_file() and hash_it:
+        row["sha256"] = sha_file(path)
+    return row
+
+
+def report(name: str, branch: str, status: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    out = {"branch": branch, "status": status, "created_utc": now(), **payload}
+    write_json(REPORTS / f"{name}.json", out)
+    write_md(REPORTS / f"{name}.md", name, out)
+    return out
+
+
+def zip_inventory(zip_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    inv = {"path": str(zip_path), "exists": zip_path.exists(), "file_count": 0, "files": {}}
+    if not zip_path.exists():
+        return inv
+    with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "r") as zf:
+        for info in zf.infolist():
+            if info.is_dir():
+                continue
+            data = zf.read(info.filename)
+            inv["files"][info.filename] = {"size": info.file_size, "sha256": sha_bytes(data)}
+        inv["file_count"] = len(inv["files"])
+    return inv
+
+
+def dir_inventory(root: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    inv = {"path": str(root), "exists": root.exists(), "file_count": 0, "files": {}}
+    if not root.exists():
+        return inv
+    for p in root.rglob("*"):
+        if p.is_file():
+            rel = str(p.relative_to(root)).replace("\\", "/")
+            inv["files"][rel] = {"size": p.stat().st_size, "sha256": sha_file(p)}
+    inv["file_count"] = len(inv["files"])
+    return inv
+

+def load_npz(path: Path) -> dict[str, np.ndarray]:
+    with np.load(path, allow_pickle=True) as data:
+        return {k: data[k] for k in data.files}
+
+
+def project_png(path: Path, title: str, pts: np.ndarray | None, stats: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
+    try:
+        from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
+    except Exception:
+        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+        path.write_bytes(b"")
+        return
+    img = Image.new("RGB", (1400, 850), "white")
+    d = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
+    d.text((24, 20), title, fill=(0, 0, 0))
+    if pts is not None:
+        flat = pts.reshape(-1, 3)
+        flat = flat[np.isfinite(flat).all(axis=1)]
+        if flat.shape[0] > 120000:
+            flat = flat[:: max(1, flat.shape[0] // 120000)]
+        for i, (label, axes) in enumerate([("xy", (0, 1)), ("xz", (0, 2)), ("yz", (1, 2))]):
+            x0, y0, w, h = 24 + i * 455, 70, 420, 540
+            d.rectangle((x0, y0, x0 + w, y0 + h), outline=(0, 0, 0))
+            d.text((x0 + 8, y0 + 8), label, fill=(0, 0, 0))
+            if flat.size:
+                sub = flat[:, axes]
+                lo = np.nanpercentile(sub, 1, axis=0)
+                hi = np.nanpercentile(sub, 99, axis=0)
+                pix = np.clip((sub - lo) / np.maximum(hi - lo, 1e-6), 0, 1)
+                xs = (x0 + 16 + pix[:, 0] * (w - 32)).astype(np.int32)
+                ys = (y0 + h - 16 - pix[:, 1] * (h - 32)).astype(np.int32)
+                for x, y in zip(xs[::4], ys[::4]):
+                    img.putpixel((int(x), int(y)), (20, 70, 160))
+    y = 640
+    for k, v in stats.items():
+        d.text((24, y), f"{k}: {v}"[:170], fill=(0, 0, 0))
+        y += 25
+        if y > 820:
+            break
+    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    img.save(path)
+
+

{"timestamp":"2026-05-08T20:05:06.929Z","type":"response_item","payload":{"type":"message","role":"user","content":[{"type":"input_text","text":"Root Controller：V223 Mentor-Final Controller
V223.0 初始化

Codex 先建立总 controller，而不是直接开实验。

必须读取并锁定：

V50 frozen candidate
V64 / V138 archive
package_files.zip
V121–V220 ledger
V127 right-hand merge gate
V131 teacher blocker / resurrection policy
V137 mentor one-page / appendix / Q&A
V135 visual board
V221 supplement finalizer
V222 cleanup report

输出：

reports/V223_controller_bootstrap.json
reports/V223_controller_bootstrap.md

必须写入：

strict_candidate_passes_current = 1
strict_teacher_passes_current = 0
formal_cloud_unblocked_current = true
active_candidate = V50
active_candidate_mutable = false

禁止：

修改 V50 frozen candidate
覆盖 V50 manifest
覆盖 V50 hash manifest
覆盖 V50 visual_review_codex_pass.json
用 teacher route 覆盖 candidate route
V223.1 return gate

Codex 后续只能在满足以下条件时返回：

A. V50 或 V50+ candidate hash locked
B. strict_candidate_passes >= 1
C. formal cloud replay complete
D. 60-view robustness complete
E. temporal robustness complete
F. full/head/face/hairline/left-hand/right-hand visual board pass
G. right-hand no longer soft-review-only OR mentor-facing risk accepted
H. forbidden scan = 0
I. no residual Modal/Python process
J. mentor package final generated
K. if teacher route required: strict_teacher_passes >= 1

任何一个不满足，都必须继续路由，不能返回。

A 线：Candidate Lock and Non-Regression

这一线的目标是：不要因为后续增强把已通过的 V50 搞坏。

A1：V50 immutable baseline replay

输入：

V50 frozen candidate
strict_registry_entry_v50.json
candidate_package_v50
package_files.zip
V64/V138 archive

动作：

重新计算所有 hash；
重新读取 candidate manifest；
重新加载 candidate points / normals / hand patch / head-face patch / temporal teacher；
重新生成 V50 baseline visual board；
和 V135 visual board 做图像/点云级对齐检查。

输出：

reports/V224_A1_v50_baseline_replay.json
reports/V224_A1_v50_baseline_replay.md
output/V224_A1_v50_baseline_replay/

通过条件：

hash invariant pass
manifest consistent
candidate readable
visual board reproducible

失败路由：

进入 A1_repair_archive，但不得修改原 V50，只能重建 mirror。
A2：V50 visual truth audit

这一步不是为了否定 V50，而是把导师视觉风险量化。

必须单独审：

full body
head close
face close
hairline close
left hand close
right hand close
60-view support
temporal overlay

输出：

reports/V225_A2_visual_truth_audit.json
reports/V225_A2_visual_truth_audit.md
output/V225_A2_visual_truth_board/

必须给出分级：

PASS_VISUAL
PASS_WITH_RISK
SOFT_REVIEW_ONLY
FAIL_VISUAL

预判：

full/head 可能 PASS_WITH_RISK
right hand 大概率 SOFT_REVIEW_ONLY
hairline 大概率 PASS_WITH_RISK 或 SOFT_REVIEW_ONLY
teacher route 仍 FAIL_FROZEN

如果 right hand 仍是 soft-review only，则进入 C 线。

A3：Candidate immutability monitor

建立长期监控脚本：

tools/v223_candidate_immutability_monitor.py

每一轮后自动检查：

V50 hash
V50 manifest
V50 strict registry
V50 package files
forbidden write

任何 branch 结束后必须运行。

输出：

reports/V226_A3_candidate_immutability_monitor.json
B 线：Formal Cloud Completion After Pass

这一线解决：“既然 formal cloud 已解锁，那就不能只停在 smoke，要完成真正的 cloud execution certificate。”

B1：Formal cloud replay matrix

当前材料显示 formal cloud 已经有 replay / 60-view / temporal certificate，但后续要扩成矩阵。

矩阵维度：

same-frame replay
60-view replay
held-out view replay
temporal frame0000/0001/0002 replay
cloud repeatability run 1
cloud repeatability run 2
local-vs-cloud artifact diff

输出：

reports/V230_B1_formal_cloud_replay_matrix.json
reports/V230_B1_formal_cloud_replay_matrix.md
output/V230_B1_formal_cloud_replay_matrix/

通过条件：

formal cloud reads V50 package
formal cloud produces expected outputs
no forbidden teacher/candidate pollution
all replay metrics non-regressive

失败路由：

B1a cloud packaging repair
B1b formal runner compatibility repair
B1c artifact diff quarantine
B2：Formal inference artifact board

这一步要补足“有没有真的跑出能给导师看的结果”。

输出必须包括：

full body open3d board
head/face close board
hairline close board
left hand board
right hand board
60-view support board
temporal board
cloud-local comparison board

所有图片统一命名：

V231_B2_full_body.png
V231_B2_head_face.png
V231_B2_hairline.png
V231_B2_left_hand.png
V231_B2_right_hand.png
V231_B2_60view_support.png
V231_B2_temporal.png

如果 visual board 仍然像 V135 那样右手极弱，进入 C 线，不允许直接最终返回。

B3：Formal fine-tune safety continuation

V62 已经有 safe entrypoint，但 V67 没 promotion，因为没有净收益。下一步不是盲训，而是做非退化 fine-tune ladder。

阶段：

B3.1 one-step sanity
B3.2 five-step bounded identity-safe
B3.3 right-hand weighted but full-body non-regression
B3.4 head/hair weighted but full-body non-regression
B3.5 combined region-safe fine-tune

每一步必须输出：

before/after visual board
full metric delta
head metric delta
left hand delta
right hand delta
temporal delta
hash isolation report
promotion decision

promotion 条件：

candidate_score improves
right_hand improves
full_body does not regress
temporal does not regress
visual board not worse

如果通过，生成：

V240_candidate_plus_package

但不覆盖 V50。

如果不通过：

freeze B3 variant
return to C/D/E branch
C 线：Right-Hand and Hands Completion

这一线必须解决当前最明显的导师视觉风险：右手太弱。

V127 已经明确：右手 patch 只能 soft-review，不允许 hard merge。
所以 C 线的目标是让右手从 soft-review-only 变成 hard candidate-safe。

C1：Right-hand evidence inventory

收集所有右手可用证据：

V50 hand_patch.npz
V34 hand wrist bridge
V55 held-out hand support
V60 archive hand evidence
V135 right_hand_close.png
V135 support_60view.png
SMPL-X native right hand anchors
all 60-view masks around right hand
Sapiens normal/depth if available
MediaPipe hand evidence if generated

输出：

reports/V250_C1_right_hand_evidence_inventory.json
reports/V250_C1_right_hand_evidence_inventory.md

给出结论：

right_hand_pixels
right_hand_views_visible
right_hand_anchor_count
right_hand_depth_support
right_hand_normal_support
right_hand_temporal_support
C2：Right-hand local candidate generator

只能生成局部 patch，不能污染 full candidate。

生成候选：

C2a SMPL-X wrist-connected residual patch
C2b 60-view evidence fused hand patch
C2c temporal hand support patch
C2d Sapiens-normal-guided hand patch
C2e conservative right-hand densification patch

每个 patch 输出：

right_hand_patch_candidate.npz
right_hand_patch_candidate.ply
right_hand_patch_visual_board.png
right_hand_merge_risk.json

禁止：

detached hand
floating sheet
overlarge 3D hand bbox
depth range abnormal
left/right swap
C3：Right-hand merge sandbox

把每个右手 patch 合入 V50 clone，但必须在 sandbox 里。

检查：

full body not worse
head not worse
left hand not worse
right

如果 right hand 仍是 soft-review only，则进入 C 线。

tools/v223_candidate_immutability_monitor.py

V50 hash

V50 strict registry
V50 package files
forbidden write

任何 branch 结束后必须运行。

这一线解决：“既然 formal cloud 已解锁，那就不能只停在 smoke，要完成真正的 cloud execution certificate。”

freeze B3 variant
return to C/D/E branch

detached hand

reports/V252_C3_right_hand_merge_sandbox.json

right_hand_visual >= PASS_WITH_RISK
full_body_delta >= 0

V10 的目标必须比 V9 更硬：

V10 不以“依赖能 import / backend 能跑 / smoke 有 summary”为完成标准。
V10 只以“导师要求的完整人体 surface 过 strict visual gate”为完成标准。

导师要求可以翻译成工程指标：

输入：
  4K4D same-frame multi-view RGB/mask/cameras
  VGGT tokens / geometry evidence
  SMPL-X topology prior

输出：
  一个统一坐标系下的人体 surface candidate
  不是 SMPL-X 壳
  不是 sparse point cloud
  不是 proxy
  不是只看 numeric green

必须覆盖：
  full body
  head
  face
  hairline/head-top
  left hand
  right hand
  wrist/forearm continuity

最终：
  local strict candidate/teacher audit 通过
  Open3D visual review 通过
  D-line 允许 promotion transaction
  再谈 formal cloud
三、V10 主计划：五条主线 + 一个总裁判

V10 不再叫 A/B/C/D 小支线，而改成：

T-line: Teacher anchor line
G-line: 2DGS / Gaussian surface line
F-line: Fus3D latent surface line
H-line: hand / hair specialist line
U-line: unified surface line
D-line: strict guard / promotion referee
T-line：A5-X2 / MUSt3R weak-pool → strict teacher-intake
T0 当前状态

MUSt3R 是真后端，并且有 301056 非空点，但仍是 weak-pool only。它没有成为 strict teacher 的原因是：

1. 没有对齐到原始 4K4D known-camera world frame；
2. 默认 confidence threshold 导出 0 vertices，低阈值才有可用点；
3. 没有通过 original 6-view reprojection / depth residual audit；
4. 没有通过 full/head/face/hairline/hands Open3D visual gate。

这些 blocker 在 V9 draft 里写得很明确。

T1 要做的第一件事：MUSt3R → 4K4D known-camera frame 对齐

不能再只保存 scene_lowconf_0.0.ply。下一步要写：

tools/a5x3_must3r_known_camera_alignment.py

输入：

MUSt3R pointmap / PLY
4K4D 6-view cameras
SMPL-X body/head weak anchor
foreground masks
VGGT/SMPL-X projected body mask

做法：

1. 从 MUSt3R pointmap 提取 foreground points。
2. 用 4K4D cameras 把点投到 6 views。
3. 用 mask IoU + depth ordering + body bounding box 做 Sim(3) 搜索。
4. 用 SMPL-X torso/head/hands 粗 anchor 做 ICP / Procrustes refinement。
5. 输出 aligned point cloud。

必须输出：

a5x3_aligned_must3r_points.ply
a5x3_alignment_summary.json
a5x3_6view_reprojection_sheet.png
a5x3_depth_residual_report.json
a5x3_region_open3d_contact_sheet.png

通过标准：

mask reprojection IoU > 0.75
full body connected component ratio > 0.70
mean depth residual < 目标阈值，需要以当前 4K4D 坐标尺度归一化后报告
face/head/hands/hairline 都有非空覆盖
不是 SMPL-X scaffold
不是低阈值噪声云
T2：MUSt3R confidence 不再手调，要做 confidence ladder audit

V9 发现默认阈值 0 vertices，低阈值才有点。不能只用 0.0 阈值继续跑。

要固定 ladder：

conf = 0.00
conf = 0.05
conf = 0.10
conf = 0.20
conf = percentile 5 / 10 / 20

每个阈值输出：

vertex_count
finite_ratio
connected_component_ratio
region_coverage
floating_noise_ratio
6-view mask IoU
depth residual
Open3D sheet

选择规则：

不选点最多的；
选 region coverage 与 residual 平衡最好的；
如果低阈值只是噪声云，不能进入 teacher-intake。
T3：A5-X3 teacher-intake precheck

只有 T1/T2 通过后，才能跑：

tools/a5x3_strict_teacher_intake_precheck.py

它仍然不能写 teacher package，只能写 precheck。

必须输出：

strict_teacher_intake_precheck_summary.json

head_face_hairline_open3d.png
left_right_hand_open3d.png

进入下一步的条件：

strict_teacher_precheck_pass = true
但是 strict_teacher_passes 仍不能手动写；
要交给 D-line promotion transaction。
G-line：2DGS 从 30 step smoke → 真实 surface candidate
G0 当前状态

2DGS 已经不是“依赖能不能 import”的问题。最终报告说它读入 6 cameras + 301056 weak-pool initial points，并完成 30 iteration research-only train smoke。

V10 里 2DGS 应该成为 最重要的 A5-X2 后处理/teacher surface 生成路线。

G1：2DGS COLMAP scene 规范化

要先确认 2DGS scene 不是临时拼的。

必须写：

tools/a5x3_2dgs_scene_contract_audit.py

检查：

cameras.json 是否与 4K4D known cameras 一致
input.ply 是否来自 aligned MUSt3R / weak-pool

输出：

2dgs_scene_contract_pass.json

失败时不能训练。

G2：2DGS long research train

30 step 只能说明 loader 和 train loop 能动。下一步要分三档：

G2-a: 1k steps sanity
G2-b: 10k steps surface stabilization
G2-c: 30k steps final research candidate

训练 loss 不能只用 RGB：

L = RGB photometric
  + mask alpha
  + depth residual to MUSt3R/A5 weak-pool
  + SMPL-X weak body prior
  + normal smoothness
  + region hard weight: head / face / hairline / hands
  + anti-float regularization
  + anti-overfill regularization

每档都要输出：

gaussian/surfel checkpoint
rendered RGB/mask/depth/normal for original 6 views
point cloud / mesh extraction
Open3D full/head/face/hairline/hands
numeric metrics
G3：2DGS surface extraction

导师要的是“点云完整 / surface 可审”，不是训练 loss 好看。

所以 G2 后必须做：

2DGS -> surfel surface -> mesh/point cloud -> original 6-view render

候选方法：

1. 直接导出 surfel centers + normals；
2. density/opacity filtering；
3. connected component filtering；
4. local Poisson/BPA 只作为可视化，不作为成功依据；
5. region-wise extraction：body/head/hand/hairline 分开审。

通过条件：

full body 不是 slab
head/face 不是空
hairline 有连续边界
hands 不是 detached dots
wrist 与 forearm 连续
6-view reprojection 不爆
Open3D 视觉通过
F-line：B-Fus3D3 → B-Fus3D4 真实 latent surface backend

B-Fus3D3 是 V9 里最强的 learned backend 正信号。它用了真实 staged assets，fallback 关闭且未使用；5000 steps / 8 cases，real eval IoU 0.9824，并且 real 明显赢 controls。

真实 surface 输出审查；

  不是只看 numeric green

必须覆盖：
  full body
  head
  face
  hairline/head-top
  left hand
  right hand
  wrist/forearm continuity

最终：
  local strict candidate/teacher audit 通过
  Open3D visual review 通过
  D-line 允许 promotion transaction
  再谈 formal cloud
三、V10 主计划：五条主线 + 一个总裁判

V10 不再叫 A/B/C/D 小支线，而改成：

T-line: Teacher anchor line
G-line: 2DGS / Gaussian surface line
F-line: Fus3D latent surface line
H-line: hand / hair specialist line
U-line: unified surface line
D-line: strict guard / promotion referee
T-line：A5-X2 / MUSt3R weak-pool → strict teacher-intake
T0 当前状态

MUSt3R 是真后端，并且有 301056 非空点，但仍是 weak-pool only。它没有成为 strict teacher 的原因是：

1. 没有对齐到原始 4K4D known-camera world frame；
2. 默认 confidence threshold 导出 0 vertices，低阈值才有可用点；
3. 没有通过 original 6-view reprojection / depth residual audit；
4. 没有通过 full/head/face/hairline/hands Open3D visual gate。

这些 blocker 在 V9 draft 里写得很明确。

T1 要做的第一件事：MUSt3R → 4K4D known-camera frame 对齐

不能再只保存 scene_lowconf_0.0.ply。下一步要写：

tools/a5x3_must3r_known_camera_alignment.py

输入：

MUSt3R pointmap / PLY
4K4D 6-view cameras
SMPL-X body/head weak anchor
foreground masks
VGGT/SMPL-X projected body mask

做法：

1. 从 MUSt3R pointmap 提取 foreground points。
2. 用 4K4D cameras 把点投到 6 views。
3. 用 mask IoU + depth ordering + body bounding box 做 Sim(3) 搜索。
4. 用 SMPL-X torso/head/hands 粗 anchor 做 ICP / Procrustes refinement。
5. 输出 aligned point cloud。

必须输出：

a5x3_aligned_must3r_points.ply
a5x3_alignment_summary.json
a5x3_6view_reprojection_sheet.png
a5x3_depth_residual_report.json
a5x3_region_open3d_contact_sheet.png

通过标准：

mask reprojection IoU > 0.75
full body connected component ratio > 0.70
mean depth residual < 目标阈值，需要以当前 4K4D 坐标尺度归一化后报告
face/head/hands/hairline 都有非空覆盖
不是 SMPL-X scaffold
不是低阈值噪声云
T2：MUSt3R confidence 不再手调，要做 confidence ladder audit

V9 发现默认阈值 0 vertices，低阈值才有点。不能只用 0.0 阈值继续跑。

要固定 ladder：

conf = 0.00
conf = 0.05
conf = 0.10
conf = 0.20
conf = percentile 5 / 10 / 20

每个阈值输出：

vertex_count
finite_ratio
connected_component_ratio
region_coverage
floating_noise_ratio
6-view mask IoU
depth residual
Open3D sheet

选择规则：

不选点最多的；
选 region coverage 与 residual 平衡最好的；
如果低阈值只是噪声云，不能进入 teacher-intake。
T3：A5-X3 teacher-intake precheck

只有 T1/T2 通过后，才能跑：

tools/a5x3_strict_teacher_intake_precheck.py

它仍然不能写 teacher package，只能写 precheck。

必须输出：

strict_teacher_intake_precheck_summary.json
fullbody_open3d.png
head_face_hairline_open3d.png
left_right_hand_open3d.png
6view_depth_normal_reprojection.png
teacher_intake_fail_or_pass.md

进入下一步的条件：

strict_teacher_precheck_pass = true
但是 strict_teacher_passes 仍不能手动写；
要交给 D-line promotion transaction。
G-line：2DGS 从 30 step smoke → 真实 surface candidate
G0 当前状态

2DGS 已经不是“依赖能不能 import”的问题。最终报告说它读入 6 cameras + 301056 weak-pool initial points，并完成 30 iteration research-only train smoke。

V10 里 2DGS 应该成为 最重要的 A5-X2 后处理/teacher surface 生成路线。

G1：2DGS COLMAP scene 规范化

要先确认 2DGS scene 不是临时拼的。

必须写：

tools/a5x3_2dgs_scene_contract_audit.py

检查：

cameras.json 是否与 4K4D known cameras 一致
input.ply 是否来自 aligned MUSt3R / weak-pool
点云坐标是否是 4K4D world frame
images/masks 路径是否完整
train/test view split 是否固定
cfg_args 是否记录分辨率、scale、mask、初始化点来源

输出：

2dgs_scene_contract_pass.json
2dgs_scene_visual_debug.png

失败时不能训练。

G2：2DGS long research train

30 step 只能说明 loader 和 train loop 能动。下一步要分三档：

G2-a: 1k steps sanity
G2-b: 10k steps surface stabilization
G2-c: 30k steps final research candidate

训练 loss 不能只用 RGB：

L = RGB photometric
  + mask alpha
  + depth residual to MUSt3R/A5 weak-pool
  + SMPL-X weak body prior
  + normal smoothness
  + region hard weight: head / face / hairline / hands
  + anti-float regularization
  + anti-overfill regularization

每档都要输出：

gaussian/surfel checkpoint
rendered RGB/mask/depth/normal for original 6 views
point cloud / mesh extraction
Open3D full/head/face/hairline/hands
numeric metrics
G3：2DGS surface extraction

导师要的是“点云完整 / surface 可审”，不是训练 loss 好看。

所以 G2 后必须做：

2DGS -> surfel surface -> mesh/point cloud -> original 6-view render

候选方法：

1. 直接导出 surfel centers + normals；
2. density/opacity filtering；
3. connected component filtering；
4. local Poisson/BPA 只作为可视化，不作为成功依据；
5. region-wise extraction：body/head/hand/hairline 分开审。

通过条件：

full body 不是 slab
head/face 不是空
hairline 有连续边界
hands 不是 detached dots
wrist 与 forearm 连续
6-view reprojection 不爆
Open3D 视觉通过
F-line：B-Fus3D3 → B-Fus3D4 真实 latent surface backend
F0 当前状态

B-Fus3D3 是 V9 里最强的 learned backend 正信号。它用了真实 staged assets，fallback 关闭且未使用；5000 steps / 8 cases，real eval IoU 0.9824，并且 real 明显赢 controls。

但是它仍然不是 candidate，因为还缺：

真实 surface 输出审查；
Open3D visual gate；
跨 frame / 跨 case 泛化；
与 hand/hair specialist 的统一坐标合成；
strict candidate audit。
F1：B-Fus3D4 不能只报告 IoU，要导出真实 surface

新增：

tools/b_fus3d4_export_surface_candidate_precheck.py

必须输出：

b_fus3d4_body_surface.ply
b_fus3d4_head_face_surface.ply
b_fus3d4_depth_6view.npz
b_fus3d4_normal_6view.npz
b_fus3d4_visibility_6view.npz
b_fus3d4_open3d_contact_sheet.png
b_fus3d4_summary.json

注意：B-Fus3D4 只负责 body/head/face 主体，不负责强行解决 hands/hair。

F2：B-Fus3D4 训练升级

当前 8 cases / 5000 steps 是 preflight。V10 要跑：

F2-a: 8 cases / 5k steps reproduce V9
F2-b: 16 cases / 20k steps
F2-c: 32+ cases / 50k steps if assets exist

如果只有一个 4K4D case，也要做 synthetic perturbation：

view dropout
camera noise
SMPL-X shape perturb
hair/head silhouette perturb
hand pose perturb
wrong-token negatives
wrong-camera negatives
same-mask-different-token negatives

关键不是追求训练大，而是防止模型学到 mask/template shortcut。

F3：hard-negative gate

B-Fus3D4 必须继续 real vs controls：

real token
zero token
shuffle token
wrong camera
wrong identity
mask only
SMPL-X only
MUSt3R weak only

通过标准：

real 必须在全局和 hard regions 都赢；
face/hairline/hands 不能只由 mask/template 解释；
Open3D 不得为 SMPL-X 壳；
不能只输出 occupancy shell。
H-line：B-hand11 + B-hair4 不能再用 proxy，必须变成真实模块

Unified precheck 现在卡死的两个点就是：

B-hand11 real decoder absent
B-hair4 real topology absent

这不是小修，是 V10 的核心。

H-hand：B-hand11 real VGGT hand-token decoder
H-hand0 当前 blocker

V9 明确写了：B-hand10 仍是 synthetic/proxy HGGT-style smoke，不能满足 hand ownership；没有 true B-hand11 VGGT-token/HGGT hand decoder asset。

H-hand1：最低可接受结构

必须实现真实模块：

tools/b_hand11_real_vggt_hand_token_decoder_train.py

结构：

input:
  4K4D multi-view RGB hand ROI
  VGGT aggregator tokens
  known cameras

module:
  left_hand_tokens

  hand visibility head
  local hand surface decoder
  wrist bridge decoder

output:
  left hand surface
  right hand surface
  wrist/forearm bridge
  finger region confidence
  hand depth / normal / visibility
H-hand2：训练监督

不能只靠 MediaPipe landmark。

监督组…2540 chars truncated…
  B-hair4 hairline/head-top surface

SMPL-X:
  topology scaffold only
  coordinate/part ownership prior only
U1 统一坐标与 ownership

必须实现：

tools/unified_surface_v10_merge_precheck.py

核心不是拼点云，而是 region ownership：

body/torso/limbs -> B-Fus3D4 + 2DGS
head/face -> B-Fus3D4 + A5-X3
hairline/head-top -> B-hair4
left/right hands -> B-hand11
seam areas -> weighted blend + continuity constraint

必须检查：

coordinate frame 一致
scale 一致
visibility/confidence 一致
region overlap 冲突
hand wrist seam
hair/head seam
face/head seam
body/cloth boundary
U2 输出
unified_surface_v10.ply

只有 U-line 过了，才允许进入 D-line promotion。

D-line：从 research-only 到 formal 的唯一合法 promotion transaction

D-line 现在不能只是“查红灯”。V10 要让 D-line 变成 promotion controller。

D0 当前规则

目前 formal cloud 仍 blocked，research cloud allowed；没有 predictions、teacher package、candidate package、registry、strict pass 被写入。

D1 新增 promotion transaction

只有 U-line 过 precheck，才能执行：

tools/dline_v10_promotion_transaction.py

它做四件事：

1. 读取 unified_surface_v10_summary.json。
2. 重新跑 strict visual audit，不信任任何上游自报 pass。

这里要注意：不能让模型脚本自己写 pass。所有 pass 必须由 D-line 统一写。

D3 formal cloud 解锁条件
strict_candidate_passes > 0
或者
strict_teacher_passes > 0

在这之前，不允许 formal cloud train/infer/export。
